syntax_7914.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7914.title: Has GUI
syntax_7914.description: Checks whether the given player(s) has/have a GUI open.
syntax_7914.syntax_pattern:
%players% (has|have) a gui [open]
%players% (doesn't|does not|do not|don't) have a gui [open]

en: Checks whether the given player(s) has/have a GUI open.

syntax_7915.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7915.title: Cancel GUI Close
syntax_7915.description:
Cancels or uncancels the closing of a GUI.
 This effect can be used within a GUI close section.
 A 1 tick delay is applied by this effect after the code has run.

en:
Cancels or uncancels the closing of a GUI.
 This effect can be used within a GUI close section.
 A 1 tick delay is applied by this effect after the code has run.

syntax_7918.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7918.title: GUI Values
syntax_7918.description: Different utility values for a GUI. Some are available in vanilla Skript. Not all values are available for the GUI close section.
syntax_7918.syntax_pattern:
[the] gui slot
[the] gui raw slot
[the] gui hotbar slot
[the] gui inventory
[the] gui inventory action
[the] gui click (type|action)
[the] gui cursor [item]
[the] gui [(clicked|current)] item
[the] gui slot type
[the] gui player
[the] gui (viewer|player)s
[the] gui slot id
[the] gui

en: Different utility values for a GUI. Some are available in vanilla Skript. Not all values are available for the GUI close section.

syntax_7919.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7919.title: GUI of Player
syntax_7919.description: The GUI that the player currently has open.

en: The GUI that the player currently has open.

syntax_7920.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7920.title: Global GUI Identifiers
syntax_7920.description: A list of the identifiers of all registered global GUIs.

en: A list of the identifiers of all registered global GUIs.

syntax_7921.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7921.title: ID of GUI
syntax_7921.description:
An expression that returns the ID of a GUI if the GUI is a global GUI.
This expression may be used to change the ID of a global GUI.
It may also be used to register a GUI as a global GUI.

en:
An expression that returns the ID of a GUI if the GUI is a global GUI.
This expression may be used to change the ID of a global GUI.
It may also be used to register a GUI as a global GUI.

syntax_7922.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7922.title: Last GUI/GUI from ID
syntax_7922.description: It is used to return the last created/edited gui or a gui from a string id.

en: It is used to return the last created/edited gui or a gui from a string id.

syntax_7923.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7923.title: Next GUI Slot
syntax_7923.description: An expression that returns the number/character of the next open slot in a GUI.
syntax_7923.syntax_pattern:
%guiinventorys%'[s] next gui slot[s]
[the] next gui slot[s] of %guiinventorys%
[the] next gui slot

en: An expression that returns the number/character of the next open slot in a GUI.

syntax_7924.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7924.title: Paginated List
syntax_7924.description: Returns the "pages" of a list based on the given number of lines per page.

en: Returns the "pages" of a list based on the given number of lines per page.

syntax_7925.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7925.title: Virtual Inventory
syntax_7925.description: An expression to create inventories that can be used with GUIs.
syntax_7925.syntax_pattern:
virtual ((crafting [table]|workbench)|chest|anvil|hopper|dropper|dispenser|%inventorytype%) [with size %number%] [(named|with (name|title)) %string%]
virtual ((crafting [table]|workbench)|chest|anvil|hopper|dropper|dispenser|%inventorytype%) [with %number% row[s]] [(named|with (name|title)) %string%]
virtual ((crafting [table]|workbench)|chest|anvil|hopper|dropper|dispenser|%inventorytype%) [(named|with (name|title)) %string%] with size %number%
virtual ((crafting [table]|workbench)|chest|anvil|hopper|dropper|dispenser|%inventorytype%) [(named|with (name|title)) %string%] with %number% row[s]

en: An expression to create inventories that can be used with GUIs.

syntax_7927.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7927.title: Slot Types
syntax_7927.description: Represents the slot type in an Inventory Click Event.

en: Represents the slot type in an Inventory Click Event.

syntax_7928.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7928.title: Create / Edit GUI
syntax_7928.description: The base of creating and editing GUIs.
syntax_7928.syntax_pattern:
create [a] [new] gui [[with id[entifier]] %string%] with %inventory% [removable:(and|with) ([re]move[e]able|stealable) items] [(and|with) shape %strings%]
(change|edit) [gui] %guiinventory%

en: The base of creating and editing GUIs.

syntax_7929.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7929.title: GUI Open/Close
syntax_7929.description: Sections that will run when a user opens or closes the GUI. This section is optional.
syntax_7929.syntax_pattern:
run (when|while) (open[ing]|clos(e|ing)) [[the] gui]
run (when|while) [the] gui (opens|closes)
run on gui (open[ing]|clos(e|ing))

en: Sections that will run when a user opens or closes the GUI. This section is optional.

syntax_7930.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7930.title: Set GUI Slots
syntax_7930.syntax_pattern:
(make|format) [the] next gui [slot] (with|to) [removable:([re]mov[e]able|stealable)] %itemtype%
(make|format) gui [slot[s]] %strings/numbers% (with|to) [removable:([re]mov[e]able|stealable)] %itemtype%
(un(make|format)|remove) [the] next gui [slot]
(un(make|format)|remove) gui [slot[s]] %strings/numbers%
(un(make|format)|remove) all [[of] the] gui [slots]

syntax_7917.creator: APickledWalrus
syntax_7917.title: GUI Properties
syntax_7917.description: Different properties of a GUI. They can be modified.
syntax_7917.syntax_pattern:
[the] ([skript-]gui name[s]|([skript-]gui size[s]|rows)|shape[s]|lock status[es]) of %guiinventorys%
%guiinventorys%'[s] ([skript-gui] name[s]|(size[s]|rows)|shape[s]|lock status[es])
syntax_7917.compatible_addon_version: 1.0.0, 1.3 (rework, support outside of edit sections), 1.3.2 ("gui" keyword for name and size)

en: Different properties of a GUI. They can be modified.
